TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
COMMENT: 
This variable applies ONLY to the Enhanced Alternative plans that offer reduced cost-sharing (i.e., 
where variable called REDUCED_COST_SHARE='Y'). 
The Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit is also referred to as the coverage gap. 
The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s
